positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical composition of mystic celestial forest elements and fauna (stylized deer, fox, owl, crescent moon) intertwined with glowing, bioluminescent flora. The style must mimic a clean, sophisticated woodcut etching combined with thick, graphic novel linework. The composition needs a strong central focus, designed to function as an elegant apparel patch or circular print. Color Palette: Limited and striking—deep midnight blue, forest emerald green, vibrant cyan accents, and muted gold highlights. Focus on strong silhouettes, high contrast, and crisp delineation. Vector art aesthetic, symmetrical, central composition, dramatic lighting.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, noise, low detail, poor composition, grain, grayscale, smudge, cartoon, photographic
